SETTINGS_DESC: Maintains continuous audio output to prevent HDMI receivers, SPDIF decoders, and USB DACs from losing signal lock during idle. Eliminates the delay when playback resumes.
KEEPALIVE_ENABLED_DESC: When enabled, feeds silence to the audio output whenever no music is playing. The receiver sees a continuous signal and maintains its audio link permanently. Works with all output types: HDMI, SPDIF, and USB DAC.
